stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"It was a good idea that I haven't seen before in other games, guiding a group of birds with your mouse could be a really fun game","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"The mechanic of moving a group of entities (birds in this case) with your mouse, guiding them, calling them, scattering them, and also controlling how close of eachother they are, is a really original mechanic that I haven't seen before in other games","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"I encountered a few bugs so that is why I put it at a rating of 3, but overall the game could be really fun if it gets more polished","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":3,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"The main mechanic/idea of this game is really unique but it needs a bit more work put into it, the game is at an extremely early stage, but once it gets polished, it's going to be really fun"}

stimulus:
You have completed your evaluation of the first video game.

Press any key to proceed to the second game.

response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"It is extremely creative in that you not only control the main character, but you also control the enviroment to be able to complete the level","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"Controlling the enviroment to complete your objective feels very original","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"the exposure meter was a bit fast but overall the game was very enjoyable","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"The core mechanics are great, they are very authentic, but it needs a bit more effort "}

stimulus:
You have completed your evaluation of the second video game.

Press any key to proceed to the final game.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"There are several games that requires you to \"slash\" the screen to make the level possible to complete, be it making bridges, destroying obstacles, etc","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"I've seen games that uses the mechanic this game has, but that doesn't mean that is a bad game","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"It was very simple and short, Didn't get enough time to experiment with it","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":3,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It's an idea that several games already use, the demo was really short and simple"}
